title: ononis natrix var. rifana
intro: Ononis natrix var. rifana, also known as the Spanish restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family, specifically within the Ononis genus, characterized by its thorny stems and yellow or purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ononis natrix var. rifana include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, treat skin conditions, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Ononis natrix var. rifana can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
